name: Denied comp because 'not work-related', now what?

mainEntity.name: Denied comp because 'not work-related', now what?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Request reconsideration with new doctor evidence, then appeal to hearing.**

Challenge causation denial; specialist reports overturn[8][2].

- Get independent medical exam.
- Add exposure docs.
- Deadlines 20-60 days.

Attorney handles appeals successfully often. Persistence pays[2].
